scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,poller,admin -c green,blue,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w @publ/api" "npm run dev -w @publ/worker" "npm run dev -w @publ/poller" "npm run dev -w @publ/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @publ/shared && npm run build -w @publ/database && npm run build -w @publ/api && npm run build -w @publ/worker && npm run build -w @publ/poller && npm run build -w @publ/admin
scripts.rebuild: docker compose up -d --build api admin worker
